Cusp

Staff Operations Platform

Intelligent staff allocation for multi-location orthodontic and dental practices. Replace text chains and gut feel with data-driven decisions.

3
Offices
18
Staff
6
User Roles
73
API Endpoints

The Problem

Multi-location practices waste hours daily deciding who goes where.

Text Chain Chaos

Staffing decisions happen over group texts at 6 AM. No record, no consistency, no optimization.

COO Bottleneck

One person holds all the context. When they're unavailable, the system breaks down.

Invisible Fairness

Staff perceive allocation as arbitrary. No visibility into why decisions are made.

Real Constraints

Norton needs 11 staff by 7:30 AM (75-min drive). Bristol needs 4 assistants Mon/Wed/Fri only. Training days remove your fastest worker.

What Cusp Does

Four integrated capabilities that replace the entire manual workflow.

1. Smart Staff Allocation

OR-Tools constraint solver generates 2 scored solutions. HR compares and selects. Manual overrides with audit trail.

2. Performance Tracking

Tablet-based patient tap logging with offline support. Dual outlier detection (percentage + absolute) flags coaching opportunities.

3. Availability Management

Staff submit time-off requests. Managers approve. The solver automatically accounts for who's available.

4. Executive Oversight

Dashboard with staffing status, coverage gaps, action items. Weekly trend reports with 30-day rolling averages.

Executive Dashboard

At-a-glance staffing status: who's on duty, coverage gaps, action items.

Executive Dashboard — quick stats, per-office staffing, action items, recent allocation runs

The Allocation Engine

Constraint-based optimization that generates 2 scored solutions for human review.

Schedule & Staff Management

See who's assigned where. Manage the roster, skills, and notification preferences.

Schedule View — by date with office, time, role, and score breakdown
Staff Detail — profile with skills, experience tier, notification preferences

Productivity Tracking

Per-staff metrics with dual outlier detection and weekly trend reports.

Productivity Dashboard — per-staff metrics, outlier flags, office summaries
Weekly Trends — configurable week range with efficiency overlay and summary table

Tablet Logging & Offices

Touch-optimized patient logging with offline support. Office management with staffing details.

Tablet Tap Log — offline-first patient logging, auto-sync, new patient vs recall tracking
Office List — locations with chair count, patient capacity, and operating status

Full Staff Roster

18 staff members across 4 roles, 3 experience tiers, with skills and SMS consent tracking.

Staff List — searchable roster with role, office, experience tier, float status, and SMS consent

Development Roadmap

13 sprints complete. Core platform built and ready for expansion.

Phase 1: Foundation

Complete

User auth, office/staff models, roles, skills, CSV import, availability workflow.

Phase 2: Allocation Engine

Complete

OR-Tools CP-SAT solver, 100-point scoring, 2-solution generation, manual override with audit trail, SMS notifications.

Phase 3: Productivity Tracking

Complete

Tablet tap logging (offline-first), daily aggregation, dual outlier detection, weekly trend reports.

Phase 4: Polish & Multi-Tenancy

Complete

Executive dashboard, SMS consent (TCPA), notification preferences, float fairness tracking, multi-tenant isolation, frontend test coverage.

Phase 5: Hardening

Complete

Day-of absence workflow, doctor staffing summaries, missing tap log detection, fixture centralization, exception narrowing. 629 backend + 87 frontend + 126 E2E tests.

Next: Patient Communication

Planned

Automated patient notifications, appointment reminders, and 2-way SMS communication. Includes HIPAA compliance review.

Coverage Assistant & SMS Reassignment

Future

Auto-suggest replacement staff for coverage gaps. 2-way SMS reply-to-act for staff accepting shifts.

Task Lists & Daily Management

Future

Per-office daily task checklists, opening/closing procedures, and accountability tracking for clinic leads.

Demand Forecasting

Future

Predict staffing needs from historical patient volume data. Feed forecasts into the allocation engine for proactive scheduling.

Practice Management Integration

Future

Cloud9/Gage integration when API becomes available. Pull real patient schedules and procedure data directly.

Culture Fit Assessment

Future

AI-assisted hiring screening tool. Match candidates to office culture and team dynamics.

Technical Foundation

Production-grade architecture with comprehensive test coverage.

629
Backend Tests
87
Frontend Tests
126
E2E Tests
73
API Endpoints
14
Data Models
5
Django Apps

Backend

Django 5.2 + Django Ninja, PostgreSQL, Celery + Redis, OR-Tools CP-SAT solver.

Frontend

React 19, TypeScript strict, shadcn/ui + Tailwind, TanStack Query, Recharts.

Multi-Tenant

Full data isolation — every model scoped by tenant FK. 30 cross-tenant leakage tests.

Offline-First

IndexedDB-backed tablet logging with background sync, clock drift detection, and idempotent UUID uploads.

Built with Django, React, and OR-Tools · Cusp Staff Operations Platform
